case_title: NICKELSON FOIL & EMBOSSING, INC. VS DAMORE JOHANN (DAMORE, RITA -OWNER)

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DAMORE JOHANN (DAMORE, RITA -OWNER) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NICKELSON FOIL & EMBOSSING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NICKELSON FOIL & EMBOSSING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAMORE JOHANN (DAMORE, RITA -OWNER) $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,675.71 FILED BY NICKELSON FOIL & EMBOSSING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DAMORE JOHANN (DAMORE, RITA -OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DAMORE JOHANN (DAMORE, RITA -OWNER) AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NICKELSON FOIL & EMBOSSING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-27-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-29-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT'S CLAIM SERVED IN COURT. IF NO APPEARANCES ON 8/29/06, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
